search.title: Zunkiree Search
search.description: Transform how users discover information with natural language search. Deliver direct answers instead of link lists, reducing support queries by 45%.

definition.heading: Search that understands what users actually mean
definition.content: Zunkiree Search is an AI-native search and interaction platform that enables businesses to deliver direct answers through natural language queries. Unlike traditional keyword-based search that returns link lists, Zunkiree understands context and user intent to provide accurate, relevant answers instantly. Organizations using Zunkiree see a 45% reduction in support queries and 3x improvement in information discovery speed.

benefits.title: Natural language, instant answers
benefits.description: Users ask questions in plain language and receive accurate, contextual responses drawn from your entire data ecosystem. No keywords required—just natural conversation.

benefits.title: Sub-100ms response times at scale
benefits.description: Enterprise-grade performance that handles millions of queries daily without degradation. Your users get instant answers, every time, regardless of load.

benefits.title: Connect any data source in hours
benefits.description: 50+ pre-built connectors for databases, APIs, documents, and knowledge bases. Most integrations complete in under 2 hours with our JavaScript widget.

useCases.title: E-commerce
useCases.headline: Conversational Product Discovery
useCases.description: Help customers find products faster with natural language. 'Show me blue running shoes under $100 with good reviews' returns exactly what they want.

useCases.title: Knowledge Management
useCases.headline: Intelligent Internal Search
useCases.description: Make internal documentation searchable and accessible. Employees find answers in seconds instead of searching through folders and wikis.

useCases.title: Customer Support
useCases.headline: Self-Service Resolution
useCases.description: Reduce support tickets with instant, accurate answers. Customers resolve issues themselves while agents focus on complex problems.

useCases.title: Data Analytics
useCases.headline: Natural Language BI
useCases.description: Query complex datasets with plain language. Business users get insights without learning SQL or waiting for analyst reports.

faq.question: What is Zunkiree Search?
faq.answer: Zunkiree Search is an AI-native search and interaction platform that enables businesses to deliver direct answers through natural language queries. Unlike traditional keyword-based search, it understands context and user intent.

faq.question: How long does Zunkiree Search take to integrate?
faq.answer: Most customers complete integration within 2 hours using our JavaScript widget. Enterprise API integrations typically take 1-2 weeks depending on data complexity and custom requirements.

faq.question: What data sources does Zunkiree Search connect to?
faq.answer: Zunkiree integrates with websites, documentation, knowledge bases, CMS platforms, and custom databases through our REST API and 50+ pre-built connectors including Notion, Confluence, and PostgreSQL.

faq.question: How does Zunkiree Search pricing work?
faq.answer: Zunkiree Search pricing is based on query volume and data sources connected. Contact our sales team for a custom quote based on your specific requirements and scale.

faq.question: Is Zunkiree Search secure for enterprise use?
faq.answer: Yes. Zunkiree Search includes role-based access control, end-to-end encryption, SOC 2 compliance, and can be deployed on-premises or in your own cloud environment for maximum data security.

cta.headline: Ready to transform your search?
cta.description: See how Zunkiree Search can improve user experience and engagement on your platform.

ai-commerce-agent.title: Stella
ai-commerce-agent.tagline: AI Commerce Agent — Autonomous AI agents that sell for you 24/7
ai-commerce-agent.description: Agentic ecommerce platform that deploys autonomous AI agents to handle the entire customer buying journey—from product discovery to checkout. Built for Nepal and global markets.

definition.heading: What is agentic commerce and how does it work?
definition.content: Stella is an agentic ecommerce platform that deploys autonomous AI agents to handle the entire customer buying journey—from product discovery and recommendations to cart management and checkout. Unlike traditional chatbots that follow scripts, these AI agents understand context, make decisions, and complete transactions independently. They integrate with Nepal payment methods like eSewa and Khalti, plus international gateways, enabling 24/7 conversational commerce for online stores.

benefits.title: Autonomous sales conversations
benefits.description: AI agents understand customer intent and guide them to purchase without human intervention. They answer questions, recommend products, and handle objections naturally.

benefits.title: Nepal payment integration
benefits.description: Native support for eSewa, Khalti, Fonepay, and international gateways like Stripe. Customers complete purchases in their preferred payment method.

benefits.title: Multi-platform deployment
benefits.description: Works with Daraz, Shopify, WooCommerce, and custom ecommerce platforms. Deploy once, sell everywhere with consistent AI-powered experiences.

useCases.title: Daraz Sellers
useCases.headline: AI Agent for Daraz Nepal
useCases.description: Automate customer inquiries, provide instant product information, track orders, and handle returns—all through conversational AI that speaks Nepali and English.

useCases.title: Shopify Stores
useCases.headline: Conversational Commerce Widget
useCases.description: Embed an AI sales agent directly on your Shopify store. Increases conversions by guiding customers through product discovery and checkout.

useCases.title: WooCommerce
useCases.headline: Smart Recommendations & Recovery
useCases.description: AI-powered product recommendations that increase average order value, plus intelligent cart recovery that brings customers back to complete purchases.

useCases.title: Custom Ecommerce
useCases.headline: API-First Integration
useCases.description: Full API access for custom ecommerce platforms. Build agentic commerce experiences tailored to your unique business requirements.

faq.question: What is agentic commerce?
faq.answer: Agentic commerce is the next evolution of ecommerce where autonomous AI agents handle the entire buying journey—from product discovery to checkout. Unlike traditional chatbots that follow scripts, agentic commerce systems understand context, make decisions, and complete transactions independently, creating a conversational shopping experience.

faq.question: How do AI commerce agents work?
faq.answer: AI commerce agents use large language models combined with your product catalog and business rules to have natural conversations with customers. They understand intent, answer questions, recommend products, handle objections, and guide customers through checkout—all without human intervention.

faq.question: Can AI agents complete purchases automatically?
faq.answer: Yes. AI Commerce Agent integrates with payment gateways to enable complete transactions. Customers can browse, select products, and pay entirely through conversation. The agent handles cart management, applies discounts, and processes payments securely.

faq.question: Does it work with Nepali payment methods like eSewa and Khalti?
faq.answer: Yes. AI Commerce Agent has native integration with eSewa, Khalti, Fonepay, and ConnectIPS for the Nepal market. It also supports international gateways like Stripe, PayPal, and Razorpay for global customers.

faq.question: How is this different from a chatbot?
faq.answer: Traditional chatbots follow pre-defined scripts and can only handle expected questions. AI Commerce Agent is an autonomous agent that understands context, handles unexpected queries, makes decisions, and takes actions like updating carts and processing payments. It's the difference between a FAQ bot and an AI sales representative.

cta.headline: Ready to automate your ecommerce sales?
cta.description: See how Stella can increase conversions and provide 24/7 sales support for your online store.

gaamma.title: Gaamma
gaamma.description: End-to-end ERP platform built for modern manufacturing. Unify operations from raw materials to finished goods with real-time visibility and predictive insights.

definition.heading: Manufacturing operations, unified and intelligent
definition.content: Gaamma is a comprehensive manufacturing ERP platform that brings together production planning, inventory management, quality control, and analytics in one intelligent system. Purpose-built for factories seeking digital transformation, Gaamma provides real-time visibility across your entire operation—from raw material intake to finished product shipment. Manufacturers using Gaamma see 30% reduction in downtime and 25% improvement in inventory turns.

benefits.title: Complete production visibility
benefits.description: Track every work order, machine, and operator in real-time. Know exactly where every product is in your manufacturing process at any moment.

benefits.title: Predictive maintenance intelligence
benefits.description: AI-powered equipment monitoring predicts failures before they happen. Reduce unplanned downtime by scheduling maintenance at optimal times.

benefits.title: Connects to your existing systems
benefits.description: Integrates with PLCs, SCADA systems, accounting software, and IoT sensors. No rip-and-replace required—Gaamma works alongside your current setup.

useCases.title: Discrete Manufacturing
useCases.headline: Build-to-Order Excellence
useCases.description: Manage complex BOMs, work orders, and assembly operations. Track serialized parts and maintain complete product genealogy.

useCases.title: Process Manufacturing
useCases.headline: Formula-Based Production
useCases.description: Handle batch processing, recipe management, and yield optimization. Maintain strict compliance with industry regulations.

useCases.title: Job Shop
useCases.headline: Custom Order Management
useCases.description: Handle high-mix, low-volume production with ease. Quote accurately, schedule efficiently, and deliver on time.

useCases.title: Warehouse & Distribution
useCases.headline: Inventory Intelligence
useCases.description: Optimize stock levels, automate reordering, and manage multi-warehouse operations with intelligent inventory control.

faq.question: What is Gaamma?
faq.answer: Gaamma is an end-to-end manufacturing ERP platform that unifies production planning, inventory management, quality control, and analytics. It's designed for manufacturers seeking to digitize operations and gain real-time visibility across their entire production process.

faq.question: How long does Gaamma take to implement?
faq.answer: Implementation typically takes 8-12 weeks for core modules. This includes data migration, system configuration, integration with existing equipment, and staff training. Phased rollouts are available for larger operations.

faq.question: Does Gaamma integrate with our existing equipment?
faq.answer: Yes. Gaamma connects to PLCs, SCADA systems, IoT sensors, and most industrial equipment through standard protocols (OPC-UA, MQTT, Modbus). We also integrate with popular accounting systems like QuickBooks and SAP.

faq.question: Is Gaamma suitable for small manufacturers?
faq.answer: Gaamma scales from single-facility operations to multi-plant enterprises. We offer modular pricing so you only pay for the capabilities you need, with the ability to add modules as you grow.

faq.question: What kind of support does Gaamma include?
faq.answer: All Gaamma plans include 24/7 technical support, regular software updates, and access to our customer success team. Enterprise plans add dedicated account management and on-site training options.

cta.headline: Ready to modernize your factory?
cta.description: See how Gaamma can transform your manufacturing operations with a personalized demo.

dental-ai.title: Dental AI Assistant
dental-ai.description: Intelligent assistant designed for dental operations. Automates patient communication, scheduling, and follow-ups so your team can focus on patient care.

definition.heading: Your practice's always-on patient communication partner
definition.content: Dental AI Assistant is an intelligent platform that handles routine patient interactions around the clock. From appointment scheduling and reminders to insurance inquiries and treatment explanations, the AI manages communications that typically consume hours of staff time daily. Practices using Dental AI see 35% reduction in no-shows and reclaim 15+ hours per week of administrative time.

benefits.title: 24/7 patient communication
benefits.description: Patients get instant answers to questions about procedures, pricing, and availability—anytime. No more missed calls or voicemails stacking up.

benefits.title: Intelligent appointment scheduling
benefits.description: AI considers treatment duration, provider availability, and patient preferences to book optimal appointment times automatically.

benefits.title: Personalized follow-up automation
benefits.description: Automated reminders, post-visit check-ins, and recall notifications via SMS, email, or voice—personalized to each patient's preferences.

useCases.title: Patient Communication
useCases.headline: Always-On Patient Support
useCases.description: Answer common questions about procedures, pricing, insurance, and availability instantly—without staff involvement.

useCases.title: Smart Scheduling
useCases.headline: Optimized Appointment Booking
useCases.description: AI schedules appointments considering treatment time, chair availability, provider schedules, and patient preferences.

useCases.title: Appointment Reminders
useCases.headline: Reduce No-Shows Automatically
useCases.description: Multi-channel reminders that adapt to patient preferences. Confirmations, day-before reminders, and easy rescheduling options.

useCases.title: Review Management
useCases.headline: Build Your Online Reputation
useCases.description: Automated post-visit follow-ups that encourage satisfied patients to leave reviews on Google, Yelp, and healthcare directories.

faq.question: What is Dental AI Assistant?
faq.answer: Dental AI Assistant is an intelligent platform that automates patient communication, appointment scheduling, and follow-ups for dental practices. It handles routine inquiries 24/7 so your staff can focus on in-office patient care.

faq.question: Is Dental AI Assistant HIPAA compliant?
faq.answer: Yes. Dental AI Assistant is fully HIPAA compliant with end-to-end encryption, secure data storage, and BAA agreements available. All patient communications are logged and auditable.

faq.question: Does it integrate with my practice management software?
faq.answer: Dental AI Assistant integrates with major dental practice management systems including Dentrix, Eaglesoft, Open Dental, and Curve. Integration typically takes 1-2 days.

faq.question: When will Dental AI Assistant be available?
faq.answer: Dental AI Assistant is currently in private beta with select practices. Join our waitlist to be notified when we open general availability, expected Q3 2026.

faq.question: What does Dental AI Assistant cost?
faq.answer: Pricing will be based on practice size and feature requirements. Early waitlist members will receive preferred pricing. Contact us for details.

cta.headline: Be the first to transform your practice
cta.description: Join the waitlist for early access to Dental AI Assistant and help shape the future of dental practice automation.

ai-booking-engine.title: Zenly
ai-booking-engine.tagline: AI Booking Engine — Intelligent scheduling that fills your calendar
ai-booking-engine.description: Smart scheduling platform that handles complex availability, multi-resource bookings, and automatic conflict resolution. Reduce no-shows by 35% with AI-powered reminders.

definition.heading: Scheduling that thinks ahead so you don't have to
definition.content: Zenly is an intelligent AI booking engine that goes beyond simple calendar management. It understands complex availability rules, handles multi-resource bookings, resolves conflicts automatically, and optimizes your schedule for maximum efficiency. With AI-powered reminders and predictive analytics, businesses using Zenly see 35% fewer no-shows and 50% reduction in scheduling-related support requests.

benefits.title: Complex availability, simplified
benefits.description: Handle multiple providers, locations, equipment dependencies, and custom rules. The AI figures out what's available without endless back-and-forth.

benefits.title: Intelligent conflict resolution
benefits.description: When conflicts arise, the AI suggests alternatives, handles waitlists, and can automatically rebook affected appointments with customer approval.

benefits.title: Connects to your existing calendars
benefits.description: Syncs with Google Calendar, Outlook, Apple Calendar, and major scheduling systems. Embed booking widgets anywhere with our JavaScript SDK.

useCases.title: Service Businesses
useCases.headline: Professional Appointment Booking
useCases.description: Perfect for consultants, salons, clinics, and any service business. Customers book online, you control the rules.

useCases.title: Resource Scheduling
useCases.headline: Room & Equipment Booking
useCases.description: Manage meeting rooms, equipment, vehicles, or any shared resource. Prevent double-booking and optimize utilization.

useCases.title: Team Scheduling
useCases.headline: Multi-Provider Coordination
useCases.description: Coordinate schedules across team members, handle round-robin assignments, and balance workload automatically.

useCases.title: Event Registration
useCases.headline: Class & Event Booking
useCases.description: Handle recurring classes, workshops, and events. Manage capacity, waitlists, and session-based scheduling.

resources.title: Widget Customization
resources.description: Embed and style your booking widget

faq.question: What is Zenly?
faq.answer: Zenly is an intelligent AI booking engine that handles complex availability rules, multi-resource bookings, and automatic conflict resolution. It enables customers to self-service book while giving businesses complete control over scheduling rules.

faq.question: How does Zenly reduce no-shows?
faq.answer: Zenly sends personalized reminders via SMS, email, or voice at optimal times based on appointment type and customer behavior. It also makes rescheduling easy, so customers change appointments instead of simply not showing up.

faq.question: Can Zenly handle complex scheduling rules?
faq.answer: Yes. Define rules for buffer times, service combinations, provider specialties, equipment dependencies, and location constraints. Zenly applies all rules automatically when showing availability.

faq.question: Does it integrate with payment processors?
faq.answer: AI Booking Engine integrates with Stripe, Square, and PayPal for deposits, prepayments, and full payments at booking. You can also connect to your existing payment infrastructure via API.

faq.question: What's the pricing model?
faq.answer: Pricing is based on the number of bookings per month and features required. Plans start at $29/month for small businesses. Enterprise custom pricing available. All plans include unlimited calendar connections.

cta.headline: Ready to automate your scheduling?
cta.description: See how Zenly can eliminate scheduling friction and reduce no-shows for your business.

ai-crm.title: AI CRM
ai-crm.description: Customer relationship management powered by AI. Predicts customer needs, automates outreach, and surfaces insights that drive revenue growth.

definition.heading: Your customer data, transformed into action
definition.content: AI CRM is an intelligent customer relationship platform that goes beyond contact management. It analyzes customer interactions, predicts buying behavior, automates personalized outreach, and surfaces the insights your team needs to close deals faster. Sales teams using AI CRM see 40% improvement in lead conversion and spend 60% less time on data entry thanks to automatic activity capture.

benefits.title: Predictive lead scoring that works
benefits.description: AI analyzes behavior signals to score leads based on actual buying intent—not just demographics. Focus on prospects ready to buy now.

benefits.title: Automatic activity capture
benefits.description: Emails, calls, meetings, and notes are captured and logged automatically. Your team sells instead of doing data entry.

benefits.title: Intelligent next-best-action
benefits.description: AI recommends exactly what to do next for each deal—who to contact, what to say, and when. No more guessing or missed follow-ups.

useCases.title: Sales Teams
useCases.headline: Close Deals Faster
useCases.description: Prioritize hot leads, automate follow-ups, and get AI-powered coaching on every deal. Know exactly where to focus for maximum impact.

useCases.title: Marketing Teams
useCases.headline: Campaign Intelligence
useCases.description: Understand which campaigns drive real pipeline. Score and route leads automatically. Close the loop between marketing and sales.

useCases.title: Customer Success
useCases.headline: Proactive Retention
useCases.description: Identify at-risk accounts before they churn. Track health scores, automate check-ins, and surface expansion opportunities.

useCases.title: Revenue Leadership
useCases.headline: Pipeline Visibility
useCases.description: Real-time pipeline analytics, accurate forecasting, and team performance insights. Make decisions based on data, not guesses.

resources.title: Getting Started
resources.description: Set up your CRM in 30 minutes

faq.question: What is AI CRM?
faq.answer: AI CRM is an intelligent customer relationship platform that combines traditional CRM functionality with AI-powered insights, automation, and predictions. It helps sales teams prioritize leads, automate outreach, and close deals faster.

faq.question: How does AI CRM compare to Salesforce or HubSpot?
faq.answer: AI CRM is built AI-first, meaning intelligence is core to every feature—not an add-on. You get predictive scoring, automatic data capture, and next-best-action recommendations out of the box, without enterprise pricing or complex setup.

faq.question: Can I import data from my existing CRM?
faq.answer: Yes. AI CRM includes one-click migration tools for Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive, and other major CRMs. We also support CSV imports and API-based data transfer for custom systems.

faq.question: How does automatic activity capture work?
faq.answer: AI CRM connects to your email (Gmail, Outlook), calendar, and phone system to automatically log communications. It uses AI to extract key information and associate activities with the right contacts and deals.

faq.question: What's the pricing for AI CRM?
faq.answer: AI CRM pricing starts at $49/user/month for teams. Volume discounts available for larger teams. All plans include AI features, unlimited contacts, and standard integrations. Enterprise pricing available for custom requirements.

cta.headline: Ready to sell smarter?
cta.description: See how AI CRM can help your team close more deals with less effort.
